chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-398 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 16-10-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far. This petition was filed in the year 2023 and lastly it was fixed in the Court on 07.03.2023, when notices were ordered to be issued. Thereafter, no steps were taken by the petitioner to have the matter fixed before the Court, which reflects that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the present case. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
